issues.detail: The skill provides high-level guidance but lacks concrete code examples or step-by-step procedures for implementation.

scenarios.name: Task CRUD with progressive enhancement
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses loader returning json(), action with <Form method='post'>, useFetcher() for inline edits, and ErrorBoundary per route; baseline reaches for useEffect/fetch and client-side onSubmit instead of Remix data APIs.

scenarios.name: Cloudflare Workers deploy with streaming
scenarios.rationale: Treatment configures @remix-run/cloudflare adapter, uses defer() in loaders for below-the-fold data, and reads KV/D1 bindings via context; baseline picks @remix-run/node or misses defer entirely.
